title.description: The headline shown on the blog list and at the top of the post

date.description: Plain display string in "Month D, YYYY" format, not parsed — matches the site's existing convention

author.description: Who wrote the post — shown under the title

excerpt.description: Short summary shown on the blog list page, before someone clicks into the full post

body.description: The full post content. Supports headings, bold, italic, links, and bullet lists.
